description: Maynuo M9712 300 W programmable DC electronic load and its M9712B / M9712C / M9712B30 variants, which share an identical Modbus command set and differ only in their current/voltage/resistance ranges (M9712: 0-30 A, 0-150 V, CR 0.03-5 kOhm; M9712B: 0-15 A, 0-500 V, CR 0.3-5 kOhm; M9712C: 0-60 A, 0-150 V; M9712B30: 0-30 A, 0-500 V; all 300 W, CW 0-300 W). Six operating modes: CC, CR, CV, CW, CC+CV and CR+CV, plus soft-start, dynamic (transient), short-circuit, battery-test and list functions. IMPORTANT: the M97xx series does NOT use a SCPI text command set. It is controlled with a binary Modbus-RTU protocol over a DB9 multifunctional serial port supporting RS-232 / RS-485 / USB (the latter via the optional M-133 DB9-to-USB cable; a plain RS-232 cable will not work). Each frame is: Slave Address (1 byte, 1-200) + Function Code (1 byte) + Data + 16-bit CRC (low byte first). Frame format: 1 start bit, 8 data bits, 1 stop bit, selectable NONE/ODD/EVEN parity, baud 2400/9600/14400/28800/57600/115200. Only four function codes exist: 0x01 Read Coil Status (read one bit), 0x05 Force Single Coil (write one bit, 0xFF00=ON / 0x0000=OFF), 0x03 Read Holding Registers (read words), 0x10 Preset Multiple Registers (write words). The 'commands' below are therefore Modbus coil/register accesses, not text mnemonics: the mnemonic encodes the function code and the coil/register address. Setpoint registers (IFIX, UFIX, PFIX, RFIX, timing and threshold registers) hold an IEEE-754 single-precision float occupying two consecutive 16-bit registers (high word first). An operation is performed by presetting the relevant value register(s) and then writing the numeric mode code to the CMD register (0x0A00). All addresses, coil/register tables and CMD codes are transcribed verbatim from the M97xx User's Guide.

identity.description: No remote *IDN-style identification query. The protocol is binary Modbus and exposes a numeric MODEL holding register (u16) at address 0x0B06 (read with function code 0x03) plus a software-version register EDITION at 0x0B07, but the manual does not publish the MODEL code values, so the model cannot be confirmed by string match. Identity verification over the bus is not supported.

commands.name: modbus_read_coil_status
commands.description: Read Coil Status. Reads one or more single-bit coils starting at a coil address. Query frame: <addr> 0x01 <start_hi> <start_lo> <count_hi> <count_lo> <crc_lo> <crc_hi>. Example: read ISTATE (input on/off) at coil 0x0510 -> 0x01 0x01 0x05 0x10 0x00 0x01 0xFC 0xC3; a normal response 0x01 0x01 0x01 0x48 0x51 0xBE returns one data byte whose lowest bit is the coil state (0 = input OFF here).

commands.name: modbus_force_single_coil
commands.description: Force Single Coil. Writes one bit. Force data 0xFF00 turns the coil ON, 0x0000 turns it OFF; any other value is ignored. Example: place the load in remote control by forcing PC1 (coil 0x0500) ON -> 0x01 0x05 0x05 0x00 0xFF 0x00 0x8C 0xF6.

commands.name: modbus_read_holding_registers
commands.description: Read Holding Registers. Reads n 16-bit words starting at a register address (n = 1..32). A float value occupies two words (high word first). Example: read present voltage U (register 0x0B00, two words) -> 0x01 0x03 0x0B 0x00 0x00 0x02 0xC6 0x2F; response 0x01 0x03 0x04 0x41 0x20 0x00 0x2A 0x6E 0x1A carries 0x41200 02A = 10.0 V.

commands.name: modbus_preset_multiple_registers
commands.description: Preset Multiple Registers. Writes n 16-bit words (n = 1..32) starting at a register address. Example: set constant current IFIX (register 0x0A01, two words = one float) to 2.3 A -> 0x01 0x10 0x0A 0x01 0x00 0x02 0x04 0x40 0x13 0x33 0x33 0xFC 0x23; the 0x40133333 payload is the IEEE-754 float 2.3.

commands.name: coil_pc1_remote
commands.description: PC1 remote-control bit (coil 0x0500). Force to 1 (0xFF00) to enter remote control, which disables the front-panel keys; force to 0 (0x0000) to return to local. Mandatory before sending other remote commands.

commands.name: coil_pc2_local_lockout
commands.description: PC2 local-prohibition bit (coil 0x0501). When set to 1 the front-panel 'Shift + 7' (local) key is disabled.

commands.name: coil_trig
commands.description: TRIG bit (coil 0x0502). Forcing it generates one software trigger (used by dynamic/list/trigger modes).

commands.name: coil_remote_sense
commands.description: REMOTE bit (coil 0x0503). 1 = remote input-voltage sensing (remote voltage compensation) enabled.

commands.name: coil_istate
commands.description: ISTATE input-status bit (coil 0x0510, read-only). 1 = input ON, 0 = input OFF.

commands.name: coil_track
commands.description: TRACK status bit (coil 0x0511, read-only). 1 = voltage tracking, 0 = current tracking.

commands.name: coil_memory
commands.description: MEMORY bit (coil 0x0512, read-only). 1 = input-state memory (input recall) enabled.

commands.name: coil_voiceen
commands.description: VOICEEN bit (coil 0x0513, read-only). 1 = audible key sound ON; also reflects multi/single connect mode in the manual's overlapping notes.

commands.name: coil_connect
commands.description: CONNECT bit (coil 0x0514, read-only). Indicates automatic-test mode / pattern waiting to be triggered.

commands.name: coil_atest
commands.description: ATEST bit (coil 0x0515, read-only). 1 = automatic test passed, 0 = failed (per the manual's note for this row).

commands.name: coil_atestun
commands.description: ATESTUN bit (coil 0x0516, read-only). Automatic-test status tag (see manual; this row carries over-current/over-voltage tag notes that overlap adjacent rows in the source table).

commands.name: coil_atestpass
commands.description: ATESTPASS bit (coil 0x0517, read-only). Automatic-test pass tag.

commands.name: coil_iover
commands.description: IOVER over-current protection tag (coil 0x0520, read-only). 1 = over-current.

commands.name: coil_uover
commands.description: UOVER over-voltage protection tag (coil 0x0521, read-only). 1 = over-voltage.

commands.name: coil_pover
commands.description: POVER over-power protection tag (coil 0x0522, read-only). 1 = over-power.

commands.name: coil_heat
commands.description: HEAT over-temperature protection tag (coil 0x0523, read-only). 1 = over-heated.

commands.name: coil_reverse
commands.description: REVERSE polarity-reversal tag (coil 0x0524, read-only). 1 = reverse polarity detected.

commands.name: coil_unreg
commands.description: UNREG unregulated / registered-parameter-fail tag (coil 0x0525, read-only).

commands.name: coil_errep
commands.description: ERREP EEPROM-error tag (coil 0x0526, read-only). 1 = EEPROM error.

commands.name: coil_errcal
commands.description: ERRCAL calibration-data-error tag (coil 0x0527, read-only). 1 = calibration data error.

commands.name: reg_cmd
commands.description: CMD command register (0x0A00, 1 word, u16). Writing a numeric mode code makes the load execute that operation; the low 8 bits are the logical code and the high 8 bits are its complement. Codes: 1=CC, 2=CV, 3=CW, 4=CR, 20=CC soft start, 25=Dynamic mode, 26=Short-circuit mode, 27=List mode, 30=CC load/unload, 31=CV load/unload, 32=CW load/unload, 33=CR load/unload, 34=CC->CV, 36=CR->CV, 38=Battery test, 39=CV soft start, 41=Change system parameters, 42=Input ON, 43=Input OFF. (The mode-table also references 35 for CR->CV; the CMD list prints 36.)

commands.name: reg_ifix
commands.description: IFIX constant-current setpoint register (0x0A01, 2 words, IEEE-754 float). Used by CC, CC soft-start, CC load/unload, CC->CV, battery-test and dynamic-base operations. After presetting IFIX, write the mode code to CMD.

parameters.name: current
parameters.range: model-dependent: M9712 0-30 A, M9712B 0-15 A, M9712C 0-60 A, M9712B30 0-30 A (each with a low-range 0-3 A / 0-6 A)

commands.name: reg_ufix
commands.description: UFIX constant-voltage setpoint register (0x0A03, 2 words, IEEE-754 float). Used by CV, CV soft-start and CV load/unload operations.

commands.name: reg_pfix
commands.description: PFIX constant-power setpoint register (0x0A05, 2 words, IEEE-754 float). Used by CW and CW load/unload operations.

commands.name: reg_rfix
commands.description: RFIX constant-resistance setpoint register (0x0A07, 2 words, IEEE-754 float). Used by CR, CR load/unload and CR->CV operations.

parameters.name: resistance
parameters.range: 0.03 to 5000 Ohm (0.03-5 kOhm; M9712B/M9712B30 lower bound 0.3 Ohm)

commands.name: reg_tmccs
commands.description: TMCCS constant-current soft-start rise-time register (0x0A09, 2 words, float). Available presets per the spec table: 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200 ms.

commands.name: reg_tmcvs
commands.description: TMCVS constant-voltage soft-start rise-time register (0x0A0B, 2 words, float).

commands.name: reg_ucconset
commands.description: UCCONSET constant-current load (on) voltage register (0x0A0D, 2 words, float). Loading threshold voltage for CC load/unload mode.

commands.name: reg_uccoffset
commands.description: UCCOFFSET constant-current unload (off) voltage register (0x0A0F, 2 words, float). Unloading threshold voltage for CC load/unload mode.

commands.name: reg_ucvonset
commands.description: UCVONSET constant-voltage load (on) voltage register (0x0A11, 2 words, float). Loading threshold for CV load/unload mode.

commands.name: reg_ucvoffset
commands.description: UCVOFFSET constant-voltage unload (off) voltage register (0x0A13, 2 words, float). Unloading threshold for CV load/unload mode.

commands.name: reg_ucponset
commands.description: UCPONSET constant-power load (on) voltage register (0x0A15, 2 words, float). Loading threshold for CW load/unload mode.

commands.name: reg_ucpoffset
commands.description: UCPOFFSET constant-power unload (off) voltage register (0x0A17, 2 words, float). Unloading threshold for CW load/unload mode.

commands.name: reg_ucronset
commands.description: UCRONSET constant-resistance load (on) voltage register (0x0A19, 2 words, float). Loading threshold for CR load/unload mode.

commands.name: reg_ucroffset
commands.description: UCROFFSET constant-resistance unload (off) voltage register (0x0A1B, 2 words, float). Unloading threshold for CR load/unload mode.

commands.name: reg_ucccv
commands.description: UCCCV constant-current-shift-to-constant-voltage register (0x0A1D, 2 words, float). The CV crossover voltage used by the CC->CV (CMD 34) operation.

commands.name: reg_ucrcv
commands.description: UCRCV constant-resistance-shift-to-constant-voltage register (0x0A1F, 2 words, float). The CV crossover voltage used by the CR->CV operation.

commands.name: reg_ia
commands.description: IA dynamic-mode A-phase current register (0x0A21, 2 words, float). First level current for dynamic (transient) testing.

parameters.name: current
parameters.range: model-dependent (up to 0-60 A on M9712C, 0-15 A on M9712B, 0-30 A on M9712/M9712B30)

commands.name: reg_ib
commands.description: IB dynamic-mode B-phase current register (0x0A23, 2 words, float). Second level current for dynamic (transient) testing.

parameters.name: current
parameters.range: model-dependent (up to 0-60 A on M9712C, 0-15 A on M9712B, 0-30 A on M9712/M9712B30)

commands.name: reg_tmawd
commands.description: TMAWD dynamic-mode A-phase pulse-width (dwell) register (0x0A25, 2 words, float). T1 dwell time. Dynamic timing range T1&T2: 60 us to 999 s.

commands.name: reg_tmbwd
commands.description: TMBWD dynamic-mode B-phase pulse-width (dwell) register (0x0A27, 2 words, float). T2 dwell time. Dynamic timing range T1&T2: 60 us to 999 s.

commands.name: reg_tmtranris
commands.description: TMTRANRIS dynamic-mode rising-edge time register (0x0A29, 2 words, float). Maximum current slew 2.5 A/us.

parameters.name: rise_time
parameters.range: transient rise time (slew up to 2.5 A/us)

commands.name: reg_tmtranfal
commands.description: TMTRANFAL dynamic-mode falling-edge time register (0x0A2B, 2 words, float).

parameters.name: fall_time
parameters.range: transient fall time (slew up to 2.5 A/us)

commands.name: reg_modetran
commands.description: MODETRAN dynamic-mode sub-mode register (0x0A2D, 1 word, u16). Selects the transient waveform style: 0..2 corresponding to CONTINUOUS / PULSED / TRIGGER dynamic modes.

commands.name: reg_ubattend
commands.description: UBATTEND battery-test termination-voltage register (0x0A2E, 2 words, float). Discharge stops when the measured voltage falls to this value. Battery input range 0.5 to 120 V.

commands.name: reg_batt
commands.description: BATT battery-capacity register (0x0A30, 2 words, float). Capacity accumulator / setting for battery test; max measurement capacity 999 Ah.

parameters.name: capacity
parameters.range: 0 to 999 Ah (ampere-hours; non-canonical unit, sent as a bare float)

commands.name: reg_serlist
commands.description: SERLIST LIST serial-number register (0x0A32, 1 word, u16). Selects the stored LIST (arbitrary-waveform) sequence number.

commands.name: reg_seratest
commands.description: SERATEST automatic-test serial-number register (0x0A33, 1 word, u16). Selects the stored automatic-test sequence number.

commands.name: reg_imax
commands.description: IMAX maximum-current register (0x0A34, 2 words, float). Over-current protection / current ceiling. Set together with CMD 41 (change system parameters).

parameters.name: current
parameters.range: model-dependent (up to 0-60 A on M9712C, 0-15 A on M9712B, 0-30 A on M9712/M9712B30)

commands.name: reg_umax
commands.description: UMAX maximum-voltage register (0x0A36, 2 words, float). Over-voltage protection / voltage ceiling. Set together with CMD 41.

commands.name: reg_pmax
commands.description: PMAX maximum-power register (0x0A38, 2 words, float). Over-power protection / power ceiling. Set together with CMD 41.

commands.name: reg_ilcal
commands.description: ILCAL current low-end calibration target register (0x0A3A, 2 words, float). Calibration use only.

commands.name: reg_ihcal
commands.description: IHCAL current high-end calibration target register (0x0A3C, 2 words, float). Calibration use only.

commands.name: reg_ulcal
commands.description: ULCAL voltage low-end calibration target register (0x0A3E, 2 words, float). Calibration use only.

commands.name: reg_uhcal
commands.description: UHCAL voltage high-end calibration target register (0x0A40, 2 words, float). Calibration use only.

commands.name: reg_tagscal
commands.description: TAGSCAL calibration-state tag register (0x0A42, 1 word, u16). Marks calibration state.

commands.name: reg_u_measure
commands.description: U present-voltage register (0x0B00, 2 words, IEEE-754 float, read-only). Returns the measured input voltage. Example response 0x41200 02A = 10.0 V.

commands.name: reg_i_measure
commands.description: I present-current register (0x0B02, 2 words, IEEE-754 float, read-only). Returns the measured input current.

commands.name: reg_setmode
commands.description: SETMODE operation-mode register (0x0B04, 1 word, u16, read-only). Reports the current operating mode.

commands.name: reg_inputmode
commands.description: INPUTMODE input-status register (0x0B05, 1 word, u16, read-only). Reports the input on/off state.

commands.name: reg_model
commands.description: MODEL register (0x0B06, 1 word, u16, read-only). Numeric model identifier. Code values are not published in the manual.

commands.name: reg_edition
commands.description: EDITION software-version register (0x0B07, 1 word, u16, read-only). Firmware revision number.
